questions.q: Which hormone helps in the implantation of the blastocyst in the uterus?
During spermatogenesis, which stage is characterized by the appearance of acrosome?
questions.answer: The secondary spermatocyte undergoes meiosis II to form a mature sperm (spermatid) which is characterized by the appearance of acrosome.

questions.q: What is the process of fertilization called when more than one sperm enters the egg?
Describe any two methods of contraception.
Which part of the sperm does not divide during spermatogenesis?
Why is the process of fertilization difficult in human beings?
questions.answer: The process of fertilization is difficult in human beings because the sperm has to travel a long distance to reach the egg and the egg also has to be fertilized within 12-24 hours of ovulation.

questions.q: Name the type of placenta in which the embryo gets its nourishment from the mother's bloodstream?
What is the function of the cervix during pregnancy?
questions.answer: The cervix functions as a barrier between the uterus and the birth canal.

questions.q: Which hormone is responsible for the secretion of milk from mammary glands?

questions.answer: Menstruation is the periodic discharge of blood and tissue from the uterus through the vagina. It occurs when the level of estrogen falls, causing the uterus to contract and shed its lining. The menstrual fluid flows out of the vagina due to gravity and the contraction of the uterus.
